description:
📈 ALL Systems: https://bit.ly/4kol0y5
🎙 Type with Voice: https://bit.ly/42isnim
👀 My Goofy pod: https://bit.ly/46nLQ3U

*Claude can now animate, caption, and edit your videos with code.*

So, Claude Design just dropped and you and I are going to figure out exactly how far we can push it for content creation. We're talking animated graphics, lower thirds, captions, and even audio processing, all built programmatically with Claude Code. And what's really cool is you don't need to be a video editor to pull any of this off.

*** CORE Software ***
☁️ Claude: https://claude.ai/
📁 GitHub: https://github.com/

⌚️ Stamps:
00:00 Intro
01:20 Claude Design explained
02:45 Building your design system
05:10 Replicating it in Claude Code
07:30 Animated graphics from any article
09:50 Turning it into a reusable skill
11:00 Hyperframes repo walkthrough
12:30 Editing a real video with Claude
14:10 Audio processing with Auphonic

*** What Next? ***
So, if you want to see everything else Claude Design can do, watch the next video linked at the end of this one. It goes way deeper into the full design firepower you've got available to you right now.

chapters.title: Turning it into a reusable skill
Editing a real video with Claude
